items.placeName: Crowne Plaza Phu Quoc Starbay by IHG

facebook.caption: Crowne Plaza Phu Quoc Starbay by IHG sits right on Bãi Dài, one of the island's longest and least-crowded stretches of sand, and it earns every bit of its 4.8-star rating from over 3,500 guests. Expect sleek, well-appointed rooms, two on-site restaurants, a gorgeous outdoor pool, and a full spa to unwind after a day of exploring. Practical tip: book a sea-view room early, as they fill up fast during peak season (November to April). This is resort life done right.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun sink behind the palms at Bãi Dài while guests drift between the pool and the shoreline. Crowne Plaza Phu Quoc Starbay by IHG delivers that effortless blend of polished comfort and barefoot beach ease. Two restaurants, a spa, and 3,500+ happy reviews speak for themselves.

instagram.caption: Beachfront bliss at Crowne Plaza Phu Quoc Starbay by IHG on Bãi Dài. Sleek rooms, an outdoor pool, two restaurants, and a spa. Rated 4.8 from 3,500+ guests. Book a sea-view room early, you will not regret it.
instagram.video_caption: Pool, beach, spa, repeat. Crowne Plaza Phu Quoc Starbay by IHG on Bãi Dài is giving full resort mode and we are here for it. 4.8 stars. Over 3,500 reviews. Enough said.

tiktok.caption: Crowne Plaza Phu Quoc Starbay on Bãi Dài is a whole vibe. Pool, beach, spa, two restaurants. 4.8 stars. This is your sign to book. #PhuQuoc #BaiDai #BeachResort #VietnamTravel #LuxuryHotel

scenes: Bãi Dài: calm, long, barely crowded

facebook.caption: Phu Quoc National Park is one of those places that reminds you the island is so much more than beaches and cocktails. As a UNESCO Biosphere Reserve, this vast evergreen forest covers nearly half the island and is home to rare flora, wildlife, and marine species you won't find anywhere else in Vietnam. Hiking the trails, you'll move through dense jungle canopy, spot exotic birds, and catch glimpses of the biodiversity that earned this park its world recognition. Early mornings are the best time to visit, when the forest is cool and the animals are most active. Practical tip: wear long sleeves, bring insect repellent, and stick to marked trails. A 4.2/5 rating from over 1,000 visitors says it all.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the jungle close in around you as the trails of Phu Quoc National Park lead deeper into one of Vietnam's last great evergreen forests. Every clip here is a reminder that this UNESCO Biosphere Reserve is alive, layered, and worth every step. Lace up and go early.

instagram.caption: Half of Phu Quoc is pure jungle, and Phu Quoc National Park is the reason why. A UNESCO Biosphere Reserve packed with evergreen forest, rare wildlife, and unique oceanic species. Go early, bring bug spray, and let the island surprise you.
instagram.video_caption: The jungle trail opens up and suddenly the whole island feels different. Phu Quoc National Park is a UNESCO Biosphere Reserve and every second of footage proves why. Go before the heat kicks in.

tiktok.caption: Phu Quoc is 50% jungle and this UNESCO park is proof. Go early, bring bug spray, stay on the trails. #PhuQuoc #VietnamJungle #EcoTravel #NationalPark

video_script.hook: Phu Quoc has a wild side.
scenes: Half the island is this forest.

facebook.caption: VinWonders Phú Quốc is the kind of place that sneaks onto your itinerary as a half-day stop and somehow swallows your entire afternoon. Sitting on the beautiful Bãi Dài coastline, this massive amusement park packs in water rides, themed zones, and entertainment shows all in one ticket. With a 4.8/5 rating from over 16,000 visitors, it consistently delivers for families, couples, and solo travelers alike. Practical tip: arrive when the gates open to beat the crowds and tackle the most popular rides before the midday rush.
facebook.video_caption: Slides into the ocean, roller coasters above the treetops, and show stages lighting up at dusk. Watch what a full day at VinWonders Phú Quốc actually looks like, from the first ride of the morning to the evening entertainment. This place earns its 4.8 stars in every single frame.

instagram.caption: One ticket, an entire day of adventure. VinWonders Phú Quốc sits right on the stunning Bãi Dài coast and earns every bit of its 4.8/5 rating. Tip: get there early, the best rides fill up fast.
instagram.video_caption: Rides, shows, splashes, and sunsets. VinWonders Phú Quốc is bigger than you think and way more fun than you planned for. Clear your schedule.

tiktok.caption: You said one ride. That was 6 hours ago. VinWonders Phú Quốc will do that to you. #VinWondersPhuQuoc #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #ThingsToDo

video_script.hook: Phu Quoc has an amusement park?!
scenes: Pro tip: arrive at opening time

items.placeName: EXMoney Phu Quoc Night Market | Currency Exchange

facebook.caption: Sorting out your dong before exploring Phu Quoc? EXMoney Phu Quoc Night Market is a handy currency exchange tucked right into the night market area on Đường Nguyễn Trãi. With a perfect 5/5 rating across 38 reviews, travelers clearly trust this spot to give them a fair deal without the stress. Pop in before you browse the market stalls, grab local cash, and enjoy the rest of your evening worry-free. Tip: always count your notes on the spot before walking away.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the night market come alive, and right in the middle of it all, a currency exchange that actually delivers. EXMoney Phu Quoc Night Market on Đường Nguyễn Trãi is rated a clean 5/5 by 38 reviewers. Get your dong sorted, then spend it steps away.

instagram.caption: Night market plans tonight? Stop by EXMoney Phu Quoc Night Market on Đường Nguyễn Trãi first, get your dong sorted, and shop stress-free. Rated 5/5 by 38 travelers. Always count your notes before you leave the counter.
instagram.video_caption: Lights, stalls, street food, and one very reliable currency exchange. EXMoney on Đường Nguyễn Trãi is rated 5/5 for a reason. Get local cash and dive straight into the fun.

tiktok.caption: Night market in Phu Quoc? Hit EXMoney on Đường Nguyễn Trãi first, get your dong, then enjoy every stall. Rated 5/5. #PhuQuoc #TravelTip #VietnamTravel #NightMarket

video_script.hook: Need cash for the night market?
scenes: Exchange currency right at the market
Count your notes before you go

facebook.caption: Kingkong Mart on Đường Bạch Đằng is one of those quietly essential stops that every visitor to Phu Quoc ends up grateful for. Whether you need cold drinks for the beach, local snacks to try, or everyday toiletries you forgot to pack, this well-stocked grocery store has you covered. Rated 4.4/5 across 515 reviews, it clearly earns its reputation with travelers. Practical tip: stock up on bottled water and grab some Vietnamese instant noodles or local chips as easy, affordable souvenirs.
facebook.video_caption: Cold drinks, local snacks, beach supplies — watch how quickly Kingkong Mart solves all of it. The shelves are packed, the aisles are easy to navigate, and the checkout is fast even when the street outside is buzzing. This is the kind of store you visit once and immediately bookmark for every day of your trip.

instagram.caption: Your Phu Quoc beach bag deserves a pit stop at Kingkong Mart. Cold drinks, local snacks, and all the travel essentials you need, conveniently located on Đường Bạch Đằng. Rated 4.4/5 by 515 travelers. Tip: grab extra water before heading to the beach.
instagram.video_caption: Snacks, sunscreen, cold coconut water — Kingkong Mart on Đường Bạch Đằng has everything your Phu Quoc trip needs. One stop, zero stress. Your beach day starts here.

tiktok.caption: The grocery store every Phu Quoc visitor needs to know. Kingkong Mart delivers. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #TravelTips #IslandLife

facebook.caption: Chợ đêm Vui Fest is the kind of night market that earns its name. Rated 4.5 out of 5 across 195 reviews, this lively spot in Phu Quoc brings together local street food, buzzing crowds, and that unmistakable after-dark energy that makes tropical evenings feel electric. Come hungry, wander the stalls, and let the smells guide your choices. Practical tip: arrive after sunset when the lights come on and the atmosphere really hits its stride.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the stalls light up, the smoke rise from the grills, and the crowds pour in. Chợ đêm Vui Fest at night is pure sensory overload in the best way possible. This is Phu Quoc street food culture on full display, and you do not want to miss it.

instagram.caption: Chợ đêm Vui Fest rated 4.5/5 and honestly, the vibes back that up completely. Smoky grills, glowing lights, and a crowd that knows how to have a good time. Show up after sunset and come very, very hungry.
instagram.video_caption: Grill smoke, glowing stalls, happy crowds. Chợ đêm Vui Fest is Phu Quoc's night market done right. Arrive after dark for the full experience.

tiktok.caption: Chợ đêm Vui Fest after dark hits different. 4.5 stars, 195 reviews, and zero regrets. Come hungry! #PhuQuoc #NightMarket #VietnamStreetFood #PhuQuocEats

scenes: Street food piled high and fresh

facebook.caption: If you want to shop like a local in Phu Quoc, the day market at 49 Đường Ngô Quyền is the place to start. This neighborhood market is stocked with fresh tropical fruit, local snacks, everyday essentials, and ingredients you won't find at resort convenience stores. It's the kind of spot where you can grab a mango for next to nothing and get a genuine feel for daily island life. Rated 4.4/5 by visitors, it's small but well-loved. Practical tip: go in the morning for the freshest produce and the most local atmosphere.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the colors roll in at the day market on Đường Ngô Quyền. Piles of tropical fruit, rows of local snacks, and vendors setting up for the morning rush. This is everyday Phu Quoc in action, and it's worth a visit even if you're not buying much.

instagram.caption: Forget the resort gift shop. The day market on Đường Ngô Quyền is where Phu Quoc does its real grocery run. Fresh fruit, local staples, and good vibes. Rated 4.4/5 and worth every minute. Go early for the best picks.
instagram.video_caption: Mangoes, snacks, and morning market energy at Đường Ngô Quyền. This is what a local Phu Quoc morning actually looks like, and honestly it's one of the best free experiences on the island.

tiktok.caption: Skip the resort store and hit the local day market on Đường Ngô Quyền instead. Fresh fruit, real prices, real Phu Quoc. Go in the morning! #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #LocalMarket #MarketFinds

scenes: Morning rush at Đường Ngô Quyền
Local snacks you won't find elsewhere
Best time to visit: early morning
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip

facebook.caption: If you're chasing authentic Vietnamese flavors on Phu Quoc, NINH KITCHEN deserves a spot on your list. Tucked along Lê Lợi street in Khu 1, this local gem has earned a 4.8 out of 5 from 215 reviewers, which tells you everything you need to know. Expect honest home-style cooking made for people who actually live here, not a watered-down tourist menu. Come hungry, keep an open mind, and don't skip whatever the kitchen recommends that day. Practical tip: it's a small local spot, so arriving early for lunch or dinner helps you snag a seat without a long wait.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the bowls land on the table and you'll understand why NINH KITCHEN pulls a 4.8 rating. The colors, the steam, the portions, this is what real Vietnamese cooking on Phu Quoc looks like. Street-side atmosphere, local crowd, and food that makes you want to order one more dish before you go.

instagram.caption: 4.8 stars, 215 reviews, and a menu built for real Vietnamese food lovers. NINH KITCHEN on Lê Lợi is the kind of local spot Phu Quoc visitors walk past and later regret missing. Go early, eat well.
instagram.video_caption: Steam rising, chopsticks ready. NINH KITCHEN is giving serious home-cooked Vietnamese energy and the 4.8 rating backs it up completely. This one is worth finding.

tiktok.caption: 4.8 stars at NINH KITCHEN in Phu Quoc, this local Vietnamese spot is the real deal. Go early and order everything. #PhuQuocFood #NinhKitchen #VietnamEats #FoodTok

scenes: NINH KITCHEN, Lê Lợi St, Phu Quoc
Arrive early to grab a seat
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip

facebook.caption: Craving something bold and aromatic after days of Vietnamese food? Bombay Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc on 07 Lê Lợi delivers exactly that. With a 4.8/5 rating across 503 reviews, this spot has clearly won over a lot of hungry travelers. Expect rich curries, freshly made bread, and layers of spice that feel like the real deal. A great option when your palate needs a detour. Tip: it's a popular table, so arrive early or be ready to wait a little.
facebook.video_caption: Watch that curry land on the table and try not to reach through the screen. Bombay Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc is turning out some seriously fragrant, deeply spiced dishes that have earned it a 4.8/5 from over 500 diners. This is your sign to take a flavor detour on your next night out.

instagram.caption: When the island calls for something spiced and satisfying, Bombay Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc on 07 Lê Lợi answers. Rated 4.8/5 by 503 diners, this place is a genuine crowd-pleaser. Go hungry.
instagram.video_caption: Fragrant, rich, and absolutely worth the detour. Bombay Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc is pulling 4.8 stars for a reason, and the food on camera does all the talking.

tiktok.caption: POV: you find a 4.8-star Indian restaurant on a Vietnamese island. Bombay Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc is the real deal. 🍛 #PhuQuocFood #IndianFood #TravelEats #FoodTok

scenes: 07 Lê Lợi, right in the heart of town
Rich curries, fresh bread, bold spice
Arrive early, it fills up fast
video_script.cta: Save this for your next dinner out

facebook.caption: With a 4.9-star rating across more than 1,100 reviews, Nautilus Restaurant has clearly earned the trust of visitors to Phu Quoc. This buffet spot delivers a spread that keeps guests coming back, and the numbers speak for themselves. Whether you are after fresh seafood, local flavors, or a relaxed sit-down meal with plenty of options, Nautilus ticks the boxes. Practical tip: popular buffets fill up fast on weekends, so arriving early or booking ahead is always a smart move.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the plates pile up at Nautilus Restaurant, one of Phu Quoc's highest-rated buffets. Dish after dish, the spread just keeps going. This is the kind of place where you grab a plate, walk the line slowly, and wonder how you will fit everything in.

instagram.caption: 4.9 stars. Over 1,100 reviews. Nautilus Restaurant is doing something very right. A buffet worth planning your evening around in Phu Quoc. Come hungry, leave happy.
instagram.video_caption: Plate after plate at Nautilus Restaurant, and the crowd keeps coming for good reason. One of Phu Quoc's top-rated buffets, and one bite in, you will understand why.

tiktok.caption: 4.9 stars and 1,100+ reviews at Nautilus Restaurant in Phu Quoc. This buffet is not messing around. #PhuQuoc #NautilusRestaurant #VietnamFood #BuffetCheck

scenes: One of Phu Quoc's top buffets
Dish after dish, the spread goes on

facebook.caption: SORI Restaurant is turning heads in Phu Quoc with a solid 4.7 out of 5 from over 220 reviews, and that kind of consistency is hard to ignore. Whether you're after a relaxed lunch or a proper sit-down dinner, this spot delivers the kind of meal that makes you want to linger. Practical tip: with a reputation this strong, booking ahead is a smart move, especially during peak season. Keep it on your list.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the table fill up and you'll understand why SORI Restaurant keeps pulling people back. Good food, a welcoming atmosphere, and reviews that speak for themselves. If you're eating out in Phu Quoc tonight, this one deserves a serious look.

instagram.caption: 4.7 stars from 220+ reviews. SORI Restaurant is one of those Phu Quoc spots that consistently earns its reputation. Book ahead during busy periods and come hungry. Seriously.
instagram.video_caption: Great food has a way of showing up on camera, and SORI Restaurant delivers. One of Phu Quoc's most-loved dining spots, rated 4.7 by over 220 guests. Go see what the fuss is about.

tiktok.caption: 4.7 stars, 220+ reviews. SORI Restaurant in Phu Quoc is the real deal. Book ahead! #SORIRestaurant #PhuQuocFood #PhuQuocEats #VietnamFoodie

scenes: One of the island's top-rated spots

items.placeName: Aigue-Marine French Bistro by Hidden Gem

facebook.caption: French food on a tropical island? Aigue-Marine French Bistro by Hidden Gem makes it work beautifully. Tucked along 1a Đường Trần Hưng Đạo in Khu 1, this bistro brings genuine French bistro cooking to Phu Quoc, and 286 reviewers averaging 4.8 out of 5 stars suggest it is doing something very right. Whether you are craving a break from seafood or simply want a relaxed, quality meal with a European feel, this spot delivers. Tip: reservations are a smart move, as a place this well-rated fills up fast.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the atmosphere unfold at Aigue-Marine French Bistro by Hidden Gem, where candlelight, clinking glasses, and plates that look like they belong in Paris set the scene. This corner of 1a Đường Trần Hưng Đạo might surprise you, in the best possible way. A 4.8-star rating with 286 reviews speaks louder than any menu description.

instagram.caption: Paris vibes, island setting. Aigue-Marine French Bistro by Hidden Gem on 1a Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is rated 4.8/5 across 286 reviews and is easily one of Phu Quoc's most exciting dining surprises. Book ahead, it fills up.
instagram.video_caption: Bistro candles, French plates, tropical breeze. Aigue-Marine French Bistro by Hidden Gem is the dinner plot twist Phu Quoc did not warn you about. Rated 4.8 stars by 286 guests.

tiktok.caption: French bistro energy in the middle of a tropical island? Aigue-Marine French Bistro by Hidden Gem is rated 4.8 stars and totally worth it. #PhuQuoc #FrenchFood #HiddenGem #PhuQuocEats

scenes: Located on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo
